hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[ehrql-plugin]"; command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo "uv not installed. Run: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh"; [ -f pyproject.toml ] || echo "No pyproject.toml found. Offer to scaffold a new project."; [ -f pyproject.toml ] && ! [ -x .venv/bin/ehrql ] && echo "ehrQL not installed. Run: uv sync" || true; command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f pyproject.toml ] && [ -x .venv/bin/ehrql ] && echo "ehrQL environment ready." || true'
